description: Update the FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md document section 6 (Gaps & Issues) to reflect all the fixes that have been implemented. Mark resolved issues as FIXED with a note about what was done.
steps: Step 1: Read the current Section 6 of FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md (lines 3648-3798).
Step 2: Update section 6.1 (Duplicate Route Paths) to mark as RESOLVED: super-admin routes now redirect to canonical superadmin routes, audit-logs added to superadmin namespace.
Step 3: Update section 6.2 (Tables With No CRUD API) to mark price_books, price_book_entries, service_categories as RESOLVED (new API routes created). Mark segments/segment_members as RESOLVED.

Step 4: Update section 6.3 (Pages calling non-existent routes) to mark /tenant/settings/audit as RESOLVED (page uses server-side DB query, not API call). Mark /tenant/products as RESOLVED (new /api/tenant/products route created).

Step 5: Update section 6.5 (Partially Implemented Features) to mark Products CRUD, Service Categories, Dynamic Segments, Price Books as RESOLVED. Mark Churn Predictions Management as RESOLVED (PATCH endpoint exists for marking as actioned).

Step 6: Update section 6.6 (Schema Design Issues) to mark FK constraints as RESOLVED: invoice_line_items.invoice_id, order_line_items.order_id, signing_requests.document_id, hierarchy_permissions.hierarchy_id, territories.assigned_to all now have FK constraints.

Step 7: Update section 6.7 (Missing API Validation) to mark invoice_number uniqueness as RESOLVED (validation added to POST). Mark rate limiting on offers/accept and forms/submit as RESOLVED (both already had rate limiting in place).

Step 8: Update section 6.8 (Frontend-Backend Disconnections) to mark Settings/audit page as RESOLVED (uses server-side query). Mark superadmin tenants duplicate as RESOLVED (super-admin redirects to superadmin). Mark Products page as RESOLVED (API route created).
Step 9: Update section 6.9 (Summary of Critical Issues) to reflect which items are now resolved.
acceptance_criteria: Section 6 of FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md has clear RESOLVED/FIXED markers on all addressed issues
Each resolved issue has a brief note explaining what was done
Items that were NOT fixed (e.g., duplicate subscriptions table, legacy tagging, duplicate pipeline stages, leaderboard caching) remain documented as open issues
The document is coherent and well-formatted markdown
verification: Verify the file is valid markdown: wc -l /projects/sandbox/nucrm-bigplan-by-vm-enterprise-v2/FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md
